title: alyssum montanifolium
intro: Alyssum montanifolium, also known as mountain candytuft, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alyssum montanifolium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal infusions and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
